code:
import io
import string

fn byte_of(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn index_of(_ haystack: String, _ needle: String, _ from: Int) -> Int
  let hlen = string.len(haystack)
  let nlen = string.len(needle)
  if nlen == 0
    return from
  end
  mut i = from
  let last = hlen - nlen
  while i <= last
    mut j = 0
    mut ok = true
    while j < nlen
      if ok
        if byte_of(haystack, i + j) != byte_of(needle, j)
          ok = false
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if ok
      return i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  -1
end

fn count_occurrences(_ haystack: String, _ needle: String) -> Int
  let nlen = string.len(needle)
  if nlen == 0
    return 0
  end
  mut count = 0
  mut pos = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    let p = index_of(haystack, needle, pos)
    if p < 0
      done = true
    else
      count = count + 1
      pos = p + nlen - 1
    end
  end
  count
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut all_tokens = " "
mut start = -1
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = byte_of(input, i)
  if is_ws(b)
    if start >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      all_tokens = "#{all_tokens}#{tok} "
      start = -1
    end
  else
    if start < 0
      start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  all_tokens = "#{all_tokens}#{tok} "
end

mut uniq = " "
mut start2 = -1
mut i2 = 0
while i2 < n
  let b = byte_of(input, i2)
  if is_ws(b)
    if start2 >= 0
      let tok = string.substring(input, start2, i2)
      let key = " #{tok} "
      if not string.contains(uniq, key)
        uniq = "#{uniq}#{tok} "
      end
      start2 = -1
    end
  else
    if start2 < 0
      start2 = i2
    end
  end
  i2 = i2 + 1
end
if start2 >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start2, n)
  let key = " #{tok} "
  if not string.contains(uniq, key)
    uniq = "#{uniq}#{tok} "
  end
end

mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
let ulen = string.len(uniq)
mut k = 1
while k < ulen
  mut j = k
  mut found_space = false
  while j < ulen and not found_space
    if byte_of(uniq, j) == 32
      found_space = true
    else
      j = j + 1
    end
  end
  if j > k
    let tok = string.substring(uniq, k, j)
    let key = " #{tok} "
    let c = count_occurrences(all_tokens, key)
    if c > best_count
      best_count = c
      best_token = tok
    end
  end
  k = j + 1
end

print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
